overview.description: AI-powered global platform connecting lawyers, tax advisors and clients for cross-border legal services
overview.description_long: Anywhere.legal (operated by Anywhere Base s.r.o.) is a global legaltech platform that connects lawyers, tax advisors and clients with AI-driven tools for scoping, pricing, document drafting and collaboration. The platform enables users to launch a case, upload documents, get structured outputs and first drafts, and share work within a professional network. Available in English, Czech, Slovak, Spanish, German and Polish. Key metrics: 750+ partners, 400+ cases in 2025, 80% AI case processing rate.
overview.tagline: Manage your legal and tax matters easily, anywhere in the world

history.origin_story: Founded in August 2023 in Prague by lawyer Mgr. Vojtěch Sucharda to simplify cross-border legal and tax services using AI

key_milestones.event: ANYWHERE BASE s.r.o. incorporated in Prague (August 31, 2023)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Anywhere.legal is primarily an AI-assisted legal document and workflow platform in an early stage. Its core value proposition of document drafting, scoping, and case processing using AI is highly susceptible to commoditization by foundation models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini), which now perform legal drafting tasks well. The network/marketplace element (750+ lawyers) provides some moat, but is not deeply proprietary.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The cross-border legal services market is real and growing, especially for SMEs navigating multi-jurisdiction compliance. However, the space is crowded with established legaltech players (Clio, Ironclad, Harvey, Legora) and general AI tools are increasingly replacing entry-level legal drafting work.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Founded in August 2023, with only one known small external investor (INVERPROF 2017 SL at 5% stake). No disclosed funding rounds, no revenue data, very small registered capital (10,526 CZK). The company appears to be bootstrapped or in very early funding stage with limited runway visibility.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Very early-stage startup (founded 2023) in a highly competitive legaltech space with high AGI displacement risk and no disclosed significant funding. The platform has traction (750+ partners, 400+ cases) but limited defensibility against commoditizing AI tools and well-funded competitors.

metadata.notes: Legal entity: ANYWHERE BASE s.r.o., IČO 19679025, founded 31.8.2023, registered at Říční 456/10, 118 00 Praha. Main shareholder: USL106 s.r.o. (71.25%, owned 100% by Vojtěch Sucharda). Spanish investor INVERPROF 2017 SL added Oct 2025. The 'FUNDED BY' section on homepage shows funders as images only (names not extractable). Site built with Framer (JS-rendered).
